body: Opus review of 80d59e2. CLAUDE.md, cli/cmd/CLAUDE.md, README.md all updated with bun install && bun run dev + bun run houdini:generate. grep -iE "react|vite|tanstack|minisearch" returns zero across all 3 files. git ls-tree HEAD -- cli/CLAUDE.md cli/README.md returns empty (no phantom files created, correct). APPROVE, leave closed.
summary: APPROVE: all 3 dev-doc files updated with bun commands, zero React/Vite refs, no phantom files created
